name: Scratch Golf Lab - Salem
about: Scratch Golf Lab is a private indoor golf training facility featuring luxury bays powered by Trackman technology. The venue focuses on serious practice with tour-level data analysis, providing a distraction-free environment for golfers looking to improve their game. It offers 24/7 access with year-round perfect practice conditions and operates on a membership-only basis with three tiered plans: Bronze, Silver, and Gold.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Trackman data provides precise insights for game improvement
24/7 private access allows flexible training on any schedule
Year-round perfect practice conditions regardless of weather
Luxury private bays offer a distraction-free training environment

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor providing tour-level data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members should bring their own clubs as the facility does not mention club rentals as included in basic membership.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify food and drink policies, suggesting it may be a BYOB facility focused on practice.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Actual playing time depends on the virtual software used, which isn't specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specifically mention kid-friendly features or junior programs.
